description: Olive and orange floaters with synthetic leather forefoot and midfoot straps and an ankle loop The straps have triangular cut- out detailing and are fastened by velcro closures Elasticated gussets on the heel collar strap for snug Fit Padded and textured footbed TPU outsole with rectangular lugsWarranty for manufacturing defects: 6 months (not valid on products with more than 20% discount)
